chunks.text: 1 IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Appl. No.S-484 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE. 1. For orders on M.A. No.3120/25 2. For orders on O/objection at flag-A 3. For orders on M.A. No.3121/25 4. For hearing of bail application. 15.07.2025 None present for applicant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General. *************** Learned Deputy Prosecutor General has pointed out that after full dressed trial the applicant/accused namely, Mumtaz Ali has been acquitted u/s 265H(i) Cr.P.C, by the trial Court in the subject crime. He, therefore, submits that instant bail application has become infructuous hence, seeks its disposal. In support of his contentions, he placed on record a copy of CFM which affirms his contentions. In view of above, this Crl. bail application has served its purpose which stands disposed of having become infructuous alongwith listed applications. J U D G E Ihsan/PS.
